plugins.changelogTitle:
# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

plugins.prepareCmd: find infrastructure/modules -name context.tf -exec sed -i.bak -e 's#//infrastructure/modules/tags?ref=${lastRelease.version}#//infrastructure/modules/tags?ref=${nextRelease.version}#g' {} + && find infrastructure/modules -iname readme.md -exec sed -i.bak -e 's#//infrastructure/modules/tags | ${lastRelease.version} |#//infrastructure/modules/tags | ${nextRelease.version} |#g' {} + && find infrastructure/modules -name '*.bak' -delete
